item_specifications.breed_recommendation: German Shortthaired Pointer Bulldog Australian Shepherd Border Collie
item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Waterproof

about_item: WARM PLUSH SURFACE - The dog bed is designed with a luxury plush Sherpa top and a slip-resistant bottom, providing extra coziness for dogs to sleep comfortably

WATERPROOF & MACHINE WASHABLE COVER - This removable cover is constructed with a three-layer fabric design for ultimate comfort and protection. The top layer is made of soft, luxurious plush to keep your dog cozy. Sandwiched in the middle, a TPU waterproof barrier effectively blocks liquids from seaching the inner foam, ensuring it stays dry. The sides are reinforced with durable, scratch- and bite-resistant technical fabric for long-lasting use. It is recommended to clean up in time to protect the health of the dog

RELIEVE STRESS WITH EGG-FOAM - The orthopedic dog beds filled with 3 inch thick High-Density egg foam, to help dog relieve pressure on the spine, muscles, and joints when resting and relaxing on the pet bed

DESIGNED FOR PETS - Rectangle shaped mattress is perfect for pets to stretch out when its sleep. It also can be placed on living room, any elevated dog bed & dog bed trampoline or in a crate & pet house
ABOUT PACKAGING - PLEASE NOTE that the pack was compressed,we suggest putting it for 48 hours to best status after openning

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, comfortable, and easy to wash, with one customer noting it's particularly suitable for senior or large dogs. The thickness receives mixed feedback - while some find it appropriate, others say it's not as thick as described. Durability is also mixed, with some customers reporting it holds up well while others mention it tearing easily. The size receives mixed reviews, with some finding it decent while others say it's too small for large dogs.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: ...Definitely recommend to all pet owners! Good quality and removable cover makes for easy cleaning and the foam insert is perfect for pet comfort!
Great bed, especially for the price. Super easy to take the outer covering off to wash. Being white, it gets dirty quickly. My dog loves this bed.
Great dog bed. Most importantly they unzip and you can wash the cover. Washed several times now and they wash nicely. I would recommend.
...bed does not look like picture, it’s less then half the thickness, poor quality and it has a big bump in the middle that won’t go down

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be good value for money, describing it as decent and worth the investment, with one customer noting it's particularly suitable for senior or large dogs.

examples.snippet: This bed was a great price but was smaller than anticipated when comparing to picture online.
...I bought two a few months ago and liked them.So I ordered two more. Great value.
This is not worth the money. It is not three inches thick. It is very unevenly cut and the fabric cover is cheap and thin. Save your money....
I bought this on sale and it is great for the price. I have a senior pup and she seems to feel comfortable in this bed....

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable, particularly for older pets, with one customer noting that the foam insert provides perfect support.

examples.snippet: It’s soft, comfortable but still sturdy! Easy to remove and wash! I am sure my dog would love it, if she wasn’t spoiled and sleeping in our bed!
My dog loves it. It's very comfortable. It's looks just like a human mini bed. Love that it has a washable cover. It's thickness is prefect.
...Good size, memory foam padding seemed comfy. BUT!! Absolutely not water proof! If that is important to you, this is not the bed for your pup!
This bed was super comfy for our boxer puppy, but didn't last an hour before she tore it to shreds. If you don't have a chewer, this is a great item....

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and cushioned, with a plush side to the cover and firm memory foam inside.

examples.snippet: ...It's soft, plenty big for her, and looks nice. I haven't washed it yet, but it looks like it's decent quality and should hold up, so fingers crossed....
...But my silly 1 year old husky/shepherd mix LOVES it. It's very soft, very thick, and the cover has held up well considering she still chews when she...
...Remove the cover, wash, and squish the foam back in. It's also super soft and he loves to curl up on it even when the crate door is open....
My 12 year old doggy absolutely loves it. The padding is soft and firm at the same time. Outside over is easy to wash and dry!...

insights.title: Washability
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed easy to wash and appreciate that the cover can be removed for cleaning.

examples.snippet: Well made, easy to clean. The first day I got it, my pup had diarrhea. I wiped it down twice during the night as he continued having accidents....
I have ordered this product every couple of months. It is easy to wash and dries fast. Our dog is very comfortable on it....
Item description says this waterproof dog bed cover is washable. Image of cover shows what it looks like after I washed it. See photo of cover....
...Durable, non-sinking support holds heavy weights evenly, with a washable cover that brushes clean easily. Worth the investment for senior or big pups.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the dog bed's size, with some finding it decent and perfect for medium-sized dogs, while others note it's not suitable for large dogs.

examples.snippet: Good quality bed. However it is smaller than expected. I would order this for medium dogs, not over 60lbs. The cover is very soft and my dog loves it.
this is a nice bed well made and a great size. lol i dont even have a dog. i use it under my computer desk to relax my tired feet
...It is very, very small. A border collie would need to curl into a small ball to fit on the bed. It also is not as thick as pictured....
Must be comfy because my dogs like it. Good size. Good thickness. Like the color as many beds like this have white top which gets dirty.

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the dog bed's durability, with some reporting that it lasts quite a while and maintains its quality, while others mention that it ripped on the first day or was torn apart by their pets.

examples.snippet: ...She ripped this to shreds the day we got it. Not durable at all. If you have a normal dog and not a Tasmanian devil beast I’m sure it’s fine.
...Durable, non-sinking support holds heavy weights evenly, with a washable cover that brushes clean easily. Worth the investment for senior or big pups.
This bed seems to be cozy for my pup but not very durable. Only lasted a few weeks before it was ripped.
The bed seems like a sturdy and durable bed but it lasted less than a week before my pup was able to easily tear away the fabric and start shredding...

insights.title: Thickness
insights.summary: Customers report that the dog bed is not as thick as advertised, with multiple reviews noting that the foam insert and padding are significantly thinner than expected.

examples.snippet: ...It is very unevenly cut and the fabric cover is cheap and thin. Save your money. Buy an old blanket at Goodwill, wash it thoroughly and save $15.
very thin, inside plastic lining tore on the first washing. 60-pound Dog does not like the new bed, same size but not enough cushion.
...We have them throughout our house in different rooms. The beds are thick and gold their form well and save my dogs elbows from getting sore!
it came with a huge dent in the middle and it's just super thin. The cover is amazing and feels nice but that's it. Not worth it

authors_reviews.title: Super comfy!
authors_reviews.text: Bought it twice—still just as great!This is actually the second time I’ve purchased this dog bed, and that alone should say a lot. The first one held up so well and my dog loved it so much that getting another one was an easy decision.It’s incredibly comfortable—soft but still supportive—and my dog chooses it over any other spot in the house. It keeps its shape, doesn’t go flat, and still looks great even with daily use.The quality is consistent, which I really appreciate. It’s also easy to clean, making it perfect for everyday life with a dog.If you’re considering it, I can confidently say it’s worth it… I liked it enough to buy it twice!
authors_reviews.author: Sara

authors_reviews.title: Sunheir Orthopedic Dog Bed - Great Value!
authors_reviews.text: This is a GREAT dog bed & it is very reasonably priced! I adopted a 55 lb APBT from our local shelter & needed a dog bed for him to use upstairs in a window seat. I found this one & ordered it. The mattress is the egg-crate style, and you can get an idea of the depth of it from the photo. It measures 4" with the cover on. The 1st one that was sent to me had an issue with one end from the way it was folded during shipping & it wouldn't regain its shape. I did an exchange online because I really liked the bed & was promptly sent a replacement. Super easy - just took the original one to the UPS store & they scanned my code. The replacement they sent at first looked like it was going to have the same issue on one end; however, I was able to just pull gently on the apex of a few of the points & they popped back up like they're supposed to be. So please, if you purchase this dog bed & you think it's smashed where it's folded, give it a try first - just gently pull on the top of the few points & they will likely pop back up like a memory foam should. The inside of the cover is like a vinyl-type fabric. This would give it the waterproof aspect. The top is sherpa. And the bottom is a smooth fabric with little dots on it. I tried to take photos of each part. The mattress will come folded up in a small box. I allowed it to lay out overnight to air out & regain its shape before putting the cover on it. The cover zips all the way around making it very easy to remove & throw in the washer. I wash it in the washer but allow it to air dry for better wear over time. And my dog LOVES this bed. We made a window seat in front of the large windows in the upstairs primary bedroom. It allows him to look out over his kingdom (like a cat!) LOL. It's his favorite place to lay. I just had a one inch mat on it before, but when I put this on, he was in heaven. He takes a 2 to3 hour nap on it every afternoon, and he has gone from sleeping in our bed to sleeping on the window seat on his new bed. We got the large one. It is a very comfortable bed, and it is very well made. I cannot attest to the waterproof or chew-proof ability of the bed as our dog does not have accidents & he doesn't chew on anything. From the feel of the inside of the cover, it appears solidly waterproof. I can also tell when I take the cover out of the washing machine. I would recommend this bed to anyone looking for a comfy place for their pup to lay. I am very happy with this purchase, and you can't beat the price or the service from the seller.
authors_reviews.author: lepoul

authors_reviews.title: Best dog beds I've ever found!
authors_reviews.text: I ordered two of these pet beds and my dogs love them. They are large and soft. The foam inside is holding up well. The covers come off so I can wash them. I have purchased many pet beds and these are the best. My beagle and husky mix can stretch out or curl up. I recommend them , get yours today!
authors_reviews.author: Laurie Walker

authors_reviews.title: Soft,comfortable Daucshund approved
authors_reviews.text: I have had this bed for a about a week now and my dogs absolutely love it. I have two mini dachshunds ages 13 and 14. Both in good health but I worry about their spines since we lost our third mini three years ago to a spinal issue. The bed seems to be good quality, I did have one minor issue that I will get to in a minute. The bed comes compressed, so it is completely flat when it arrives. It was fully expanded in about an hour, if it even took that long. There is no bad smell to the bed like some have. The material is very soft on the top and the bottom is durable. The zipper makes it easy to open and take the pad out so the cover can be washed. Now to my issue. My dog threw up on it the other day and it is water proof and it did not soak through to padding. That is a huge plus. I removed the cover with ease and I added it to the wash as per the recommended wash instructions. I washed it with towels that I used to give the dogs a bath that same day. When I removed the cover from the dryer and unzipped it to put the cushion back on the inside waterproof material has holes in it now. Now I am not 100% sure if that was caused by the washing or if they were there when I received it. The padding was already in the cover when it came, so I didn't open it to look. I also did not notice them when I removed the pad before washing it. So anyway, that is why it is lacking a star. So just beware when you wash the cover. Make sure there are no defects before putting it in the wash. I am afraid now that the spots that have the holes will continue to rip when my dogs wiggle around on the bed.
authors_reviews.author: Kristin

authors_reviews.title: Best dog bed EVER!!!
authors_reviews.text: This is an amazing dog bed! The pad is extremely sturdy and supportive and fits our dog’s crate perfectly, but the best is the cover! The inside of the cover is waterproof, so the pad never gets wet from “accidents.” Unzip, wash and dry on low, and it’s back on the pad in a short time! Our 8 year old Maltese was sick in bed, cleanup was so easy!! This is a game changer for dog bedding!!
authors_reviews.author: Rebecca Mada

authors_reviews.title: Trust the process, wait overnight.
authors_reviews.text: I opened this and thought it was trash because there was a harsh fold that seemed almost melted in, and the foam was maybe 2 inches thick. I was going to return it but saw a review that said to let it set. I'm so glad I did- it puffed up and flattened out. Looks great now. It's really nice quality and my pups love it. I would order this again.
authors_reviews.author: Sting Underhill

other_countries_reviews.title: Average quality
other_countries_reviews.text: I bought this bed for my young puppy because it was advertised as anti chew. Unfortunately she ripped the side within the first hour, so the bed didn't last long. Also the size is slightly smaller than advertised. The price wasn't too expensive so I guess was worth what i paid for
other_countries_reviews.author: Anna Y.

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect one
other_countries_reviews.text: My baby loving his new bed. ❤️
other_countries_reviews.author: Shri roy

other_countries_reviews.title: Mattress of dog
other_countries_reviews.text: My pet likedvit very much, it feels comfortable on it ful night
other_countries_reviews.author: Preetimittal

other_countries_reviews.title: SCAM....Not as advertised, very thin, No pickup & No refund yet
other_countries_reviews.text: This product is not like what is advertised. It is mentioned as 3-inch thick XXL orthopedic bed, but what I received is very thin and feels more like a mat than a proper bed. Cushioning and support are not as expected for a big dog.Return was approved and pickup was scheduled on Feb 19, but pickup has still not happened. I am also unable to contact Amazon support regarding this delay. No refund yet.Overall, the cover quality is okay, but thickness and support do not match the description.
other_countries_reviews.author: Krithik
